implementation_stage_mapping.E3: after the S3 N=100 pulse gate and before S5 formal promotion
implementation_stage_mapping.E4: S4 tolerance work when applicable and S5 cross-solver closure

formal_baseline_policy.authority: the current oa_tof formal baseline using the coupled accelerator-reflectron theory

coordinate_semantics.z: oaTOF acceleration and coupled longitudinal time-focusing direction
coordinate_semantics.x: RF injection direction; transverse to oa acceleration but directly coupled to entry timing and pulse capture
coordinate_semantics.y: lateral direction; primarily coupled to spot size, aperture loss and detector position

candidate_space.width_execution_policy: screen in descending order; refine only survivors and decision-neighbour candidates
candidate_space.geometric_filtering_policy: A beam wider than the downstream aperture is allowed; report geometric loss separately from field-induced loss.

experiment_stages.name: component_resolved_field_diagnostics
required_outputs: Ex and Ey profile perturbations reported separately
Ex, Ey and Ez line integrals along the injection axis
experiment_stages.claim_limit: Diagnostic only; a field-reference alert cannot accept or reject a physical connector.

experiment_stages.name: connection_specific_numerical_qualification
experiment_stages.outer_domain_policy: Test the opened geometry, not only the closed control; replace an arbitrary vacuum box by the real grounded connector or enclosure boundary before final qualification.
experiment_stages.conditional_refinement_rule: Use 0.125 mm only when the same downstream time-dependent model proves that the last two settings change a capture or final-performance decision. A local field or RF-phase difference alone does not authorize refinement.

experiment_stages.name: n100_no_oa_pulse_functional_screen
experiment_stages.time_policy: Preserve instrument global time, particle age and RF phase; do not reset release time to zero.
experiment_stages.claim_limit: Screens entry, trajectory and additional loss with RF plus always-on oa field; makes no pulse-capture or final-resolution claim.

experiment_stages.name: n1000_full_oatof_pulse_and_resolution_confirmation
required_physics: frozen oa extraction waveform on the shared instrument clock
experiment_stages.adaptive_particle_rule: Increase beyond N=1000 only if the 95% confidence interval overlaps a frozen decision boundary.

experiment_stages.name: phase_alignment_and_cross_solver_robustness
required_variations: pulse delay about the coupled-theory prediction
COMSOL-SIMION-CAD consistency for the selected candidate

transport: detector fraction relative to the RF exit population

field_limit_derivation.component_policy: Derive separate longitudinal-z, injection-x and lateral-y screening limits; never use aggregate transverse RMS alone.
field_limit_derivation.safety_rule: Freeze each incremental screening limit at 0.8 times the smallest performance-derived failure perturbation, measured relative to the closed reference.
field_limit_derivation.final_authority: The numerically qualified full physical-field particle result remains authoritative because accelerator and reflectron focusing are coupled.

result_data_policy.required_statistics: paired particle identities with bootstrap or equivalent 95% confidence intervals

rf_mesh_state_input.required_next_test: At the later physical-refinement stage, replay the selected state table through one joint connector and oa pulse waveform on the shared instrument clock; this is not required for current functional workflow use.
rf_mesh_state_input.forbidden_shortcut: Do not choose a mesh from local field maxima, transmission alone, or RF phase alone.
